title: Project 5: Object Detection
html:
Project 5: Object Detection

Detect and localize multiple objects in images.

Difficulty

Advanced

Time Estimate

2-3 weeks

Skills You'll Practice

  • Computer Vision
  • Object Detection
  • YOLO
  • R-CNN

Learning Objectives

  • Understand object detection architectures
  • Implement YOLO
  • Use R-CNN family
  • Handle bounding box regression
  • Evaluate with mAP

Dataset

COCO Dataset or custom dataset

Project Steps

  1. Prepare object detection dataset
  2. Implement YOLO
  3. Try R-CNN variants
  4. Train detection model
  5. Evaluate with mAP
  6. Real-time detection

Resources

  • YOLO Documentation
  • Object Detection Guide
